visa_types.name: Short Term Languages (Max 90 Days)
visa_types.documents_required:
In general the applicant is advised to provide documentation in original. Additional documentation may be required. In case the applicant cannot give the VAC the original version   of the document, a copy must be added and the original shown at the VAC.
Information sheets for download.
To calculate the allowed period of stay according to issued visa and previous trips please click here. (http://ec.europa.eu/dgs/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas/border-crossing/index_en.htm)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[aut > ukr > en > Table:Short Term Languages (Max 90 Days) > Visa Fees 1]
Visa Facilitation Agreements between the European Community and the countries of Ukraine, Russia, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Macedonia, Albania, Georgia, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Serbia, Montenegro
                                                                            and Moldova, determine the visa fees. For other nationalities the fees are determined by the Visa Code of EU. All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
For persons who wish to travel to Austria for attending a language course for maximum of 90 days within 6 months. 
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category 
Please note that Visa Application Center accepts new sample of application form only. New sample of application form is available on our website using section “Download form”.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For persons who wish to travel to Austria for attending a language course for maximum of 90 days within 6 months. 
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category 
Please note that Visa Application Center accepts new sample of application form only. New sample of application form is available on our website using section “Download form”.

## Visa Fees

[aut > ukr > en > Table:Short Term Languages (Max 90 Days) > Visa Fees 1]
Visa Facilitation Agreements between the European Community and the countries of Ukraine, Russia, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Macedonia, Albania, Georgia, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Serbia, Montenegro
                                                                            and Moldova, determine the visa fees. For other nationalities the fees are determined by the Visa Code of EU. All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.

## Documents Required
In general the applicant is advised to provide documentation in original. Additional documentation may be required. In case the applicant cannot give the VAC the original version   of the document, a copy must be added and the original shown at the VAC.
Information sheets for download.
To calculate the allowed period of stay according to issued visa and previous trips please click here. (http://ec.europa.eu/dgs/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas/border-crossing/index_en.htm)

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed
Please note that photographs should meet the above specifications.

## Download Form
Dear Customers!
Please note that for your convenience you can use the service of Visa Application Form Filling. The service is optional. The price of the service is 85 UAH. Please check with Visa Application Centre employees to get more details.
Visa Application forms listed below must be filled in completely (in English or German language only) and signed by the customer personally. First name and last name must be put in Latin letters, as it is indicated in international passport. 
Visa Application form for minor customers should be signed by one of parents or official tutor.
Please note that the Application Form for Schengen visa should be signed twice. Application form with one signature would not be accepted. 

Visa Application Form

visa_types.overview:
Overview
For persons who received an official invitation from Austria or from International Organisation for short term visits of maximum of 90 days within 6 months.
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. 
Please note that Visa Application Center accepts new sample of application form only. New sample of application form is available on our website using section “Download form”.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For persons who received an official invitation from Austria or from International Organisation for short term visits of maximum of 90 days within 6 months.
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. 
Please note that Visa Application Center accepts new sample of application form only. New sample of application form is available on our website using section “Download form”.

## Visa Fees

[aut > ukr > en > Table:Official Invitation > Visa Fees 1]
Visa Facilitation Agreements between the European Community and the countries of Ukraine, Russia, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Macedonia, Albania, Georgia,Armenia, Azerbaijan, Serbia, Montenegro
                                                                            and Moldova, determine the visa fees. For other nationalities the fees are determined by the Visa Code of EU. All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.

## Documents Required
In general the applicant is advised to provide documentation in original. Additional documentation may be required. In case the applicant cannot give the VAC the original version of the document, a copy must be added and the original shown at the VAC.
Information sheets for download. 
To calculate the allowed period of stay according to issued visa and previous trips please click here. (http://ec.europa.eu/dgs/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas/border-crossing/index_en.htm)

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed
Please note that photographs should meet the above specifications.

## Download Form
Dear Customers!
Please note that for your convenience you can use the service of Visa Application Form Filling. The service is optional. The price of the service is 85 UAH. Please check with Visa Application Centre employees to get more details.
Visa Application forms listed below must be filled in completely (in English or German language only) and signed by the customer personally. First name and last name must be put in  Latin letters, as it is indicated in international passport. 
Visa Application form for minor customers should be signed by one of parents or official tutor.
Please note that the Application Form for Schengen visa should be signed twice. Application form with one signature would not be accepted. 

Visa Application Form

info sheet for download
To calculate the allowed period of stay according to issued visa and previous trips please click here. (http://ec.europa.eu/dgs/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas/border-crossing/index_en.htm)

## Download Instructions:
The forms are in PDF format. You will need an Adobe Acrobat Reader to view and download these forms.  Please 
click here (http://get.adobe.com/reader/) to download Adobe Acrobat Reader.

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed
Please note that photographs should meet the above specifications.

## Download Form
Forms listed below must be filled in completely (in English or in German languages only) and must be signed by the applicant himself/herself.
Please note that application form for Schengen visa  should be signed twice. Application forms with one signature would not be  accepted.
New Visa application form can be downloaded and printed from the link below. Forms are also available at the Visa Application Centre (free of charge).

## Visa Application Form

## Download Instructions:
The forms are in PDF format. You will need an Adobe Acrobat Reader to view and download these forms.  Please 
click here (http://get.adobe.com/reader/) to download Adobe Acrobat Reader.

## To Download a Form:

OR

- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Seasonal-workers (More Than 90 Days)
visa_types.documents_required:
In general the applicant is advised to provide documentation in original. Additional documentation may be required. In case the applicant cannot give the VAC the original version of the document, a copy must be added and the original shown at the VAC.
Personal application is required - except seasonal workers who have been employed twice by the same seasonal employer, in which case the application can be submitted by a representative together with a written authorization + copy of ID of representative + written confirmation of seasonal employer 
Information sheets for download
To calculate the allowed period of stay according to issued visa and previous trips please click here. (http://ec.europa.eu/dgs/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas/border-crossing/index_en.htm)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[aut > ukr > en > Table:Seasonal-workers (More Than 90 Days) > Visa Fees 1]

All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work seasonal work for more than 90 days up to 6 months. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) may be
                                                                            required. 
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category 
Please note that Visa Application Center accepts new sample of application form only. New sample of application form is available on our website using section “Download form”.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work seasonal work for more than 90 days up to 6 months. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) may be
                                                                            required. 
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category 
Please note that Visa Application Center accepts new sample of application form only. New sample of application form is available on our website using section “Download form”.

## Visa Fees

[aut > ukr > en > Table:Seasonal-workers (More Than 90 Days) > Visa Fees 1]

All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.

## Documents Required
In general the applicant is advised to provide documentation in original. Additional documentation may be required. In case the applicant cannot give the VAC the original version of the document, a copy must be added and the original shown at the VAC.
Personal application is required - except seasonal workers who have been employed twice by the same seasonal employer, in which case the application can be submitted by a representative together with a written authorization + copy of ID of representative + written confirmation of seasonal employer

To calculate the allowed period of stay according to issued visa and previous trips please click here. (http://ec.europa.eu/dgs/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas/border-crossing/index_en.htm)

visa_types.name: LONG STAY VISA
visa_types.overview:
If you are planning a longer stay (more than 90 days for up to 6 months) in Austria, you need to apply for a Long Term National Visa D. 
Please note that students who intend to study in Austria can no longer be accepted in Visa Application Centers . If you wish to apply for a student visa, you will need to apply in person at the Austrian Embassy in Kyiv. 
For more information please visit the Homepage of the Embassy  (http://www.bmeia.gv.at/botschaft/kiew/ratgeber/reisen-nach-oesterreich.html))
visa_types.full_text:
If you are planning a longer stay (more than 90 days for up to 6 months) in Austria, you need to apply for a Long Term National Visa D. 
Please note that students who intend to study in Austria can no longer be accepted in Visa Application Centers . If you wish to apply for a student visa, you will need to apply in person at the Austrian Embassy in Kyiv. 
For more information please visit the Homepage of the Embassy  (http://www.bmeia.gv.at/botschaft/kiew/ratgeber/reisen-nach-oesterreich.html))

visa_types.name: Seasonal-workers (Max 90 Days)
visa_types.documents_required:
In general the applicant is advised to provide documentation in original. Additional documentation may be required. In case the applicant cannot give the VAC the original version  of the document, a copy must be added and the original shown at the VAC.
Personal application is required - except seasonal workers who have been employed twice by the same seasonal employer, in which case the application can be submitted by a representative  together with a written authorization + copy of ID of representative + written confirmation of seasonal employer 
Information sheets for download. 
To calculate the allowed period of stay according to issued visa and previous trips please click here. (http://ec.europa.eu/dgs/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas/border-crossing/index_en.htm)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[aut > ukr > en > Table:Seasonal-workers (Max 90 Days) > Visa Fees 1]
Visa Facilitation Agreements between the European Community and the countries of Ukraine, Russia, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Macedonia, Albania, Georgia, , Armenia, Azerbaijan, Serbia, Montenegro
                                                                            and Moldova, determine the visa fees. For other nationalities the fees are determined by the Visa Code of EU. All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work seasonal work for maximum of 90 days. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) may be required. 
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category 
Please note that Visa Application Center accepts new sample of application form only. New sample of application form is available on our website using section “Download form”.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category applies to persons who wish to travel to Austria for work seasonal work for maximum of 90 days. Confirmation of the Labour Market Service (AMS) may be required. 
Applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category 
Please note that Visa Application Center accepts new sample of application form only. New sample of application form is available on our website using section “Download form”.

## Visa Fees

[aut > ukr > en > Table:Seasonal-workers (Max 90 Days) > Visa Fees 1]
Visa Facilitation Agreements between the European Community and the countries of Ukraine, Russia, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Macedonia, Albania, Georgia, , Armenia, Azerbaijan, Serbia, Montenegro
                                                                            and Moldova, determine the visa fees. For other nationalities the fees are determined by the Visa Code of EU. All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
All paid visa fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.

## Documents Required
In general the applicant is advised to provide documentation in original. Additional documentation may be required. In case the applicant cannot give the VAC the original version  of the document, a copy must be added and the original shown at the VAC.
Personal application is required - except seasonal workers who have been employed twice by the same seasonal employer, in which case the application can be submitted by a representative  together with a written authorization + copy of ID of representative + written confirmation of seasonal employer 
Information sheets for download. 
To calculate the allowed period of stay according to issued visa and previous trips please click here. (http://ec.europa.eu/dgs/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas/border-crossing/index_en.htm)

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed
Please note that photographs should meet the above specifications.

## Download Form
Dear Customers!
Please note that for your convenience you can use the service of Visa Application Form Filling. The service is optional. The price of the service is 85 UAH. Please check with Visa  Application Centre employees to get more details.
Visa Application forms listed below must be filled in completely (in English or German language only) and signed by the customer personally. First name and last name must be put in Latin letters, as it is indicated in international passport. 
Visa Application form for minor customers should be signed by one of parents or official tutor.
Please note that the Application Form for Schengen visa should be signed twice. Application form with one signature would not be accepted. 
Visa Application Form

visa_types.name: SHORT STAY VISA
visa_types.overview:
If you wish to visit Austria for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Austria. Ukrainian nationals require
                                                                a visa to Austria.
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Austria and/or the other Schengen countries** for a limited period of time (90 days). If you wish to reside in Austria for an extended
                                                                period of time (more than three months),, you need to apply for a long term visa at the Visa Application Centre.
The possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry to a Schengen country. The visa holder is requested to present proof that they fulfill the entry conditions at the border
                                                                (valid travel document, valid visa, and valid purpose of travel with adequate means of travel).
** Schengen countries: Austria, Belgium, the Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg,
                                                                Malta, The Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and Switzerland.
visa_types.full_text:
If you wish to visit Austria for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering Austria. Ukrainian nationals require
                                                                a visa to Austria.
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Austria and/or the other Schengen countries** for a limited period of time (90 days). If you wish to reside in Austria for an extended
                                                                period of time (more than three months),, you need to apply for a long term visa at the Visa Application Centre.
The possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry to a Schengen country. The visa holder is requested to present proof that they fulfill the entry conditions at the border
                                                                (valid travel document, valid visa, and valid purpose of travel with adequate means of travel).
** Schengen countries: Austria, Belgium, the Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg,
                                                                Malta, The Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and Switzerland.

To calculate the allowed period of stay according to issued visa and previous trips please click here. (http://ec.europa.eu/dgs/home-affairs/what-we-do/policies/borders-and-visas/border-crossing/index_en.htm)

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed
Please note that photographs should meet the above specifications.

## Download Form
Dear Customers!
Please note that for your convenience you can use the service of Visa Application Form Filling. The service is optional. The price of the service is 85 UAH. Please check with Visa Application Centre employees to get more details.
Visa Application forms listed below must be filled in completely (in English or German language only) and signed by the customer personally. First name and last name must be put in Latin letters, as it is indicated in international passport. 
Visa Application form for minor customers should be signed by one of parents or official tutor.
Please note that the Application Form for Schengen visa should be signed twice. Application form with one signature would not be accepted. 
Visa Application Form

## Download Instructions:
The forms are in PDF format. You will need an Adobe Acrobat Reader to view and download these forms.  Please 
 click here (http://get.adobe.com/reader/) to download Adobe Acrobat Reader.

## To Download a Form:

- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications

- Must be an up-to-date photograph (preferably max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be passport sized 3,5 x 4,5 cm
- Close up to your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph
- Full face taken straight forward 30 - 36 mm from point of the chin to head of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be closed
Please note that photographs should meet the above specifications.

## Download Form
Forms listed below must be filled in completely (in English or in German languages only) and must be signed by the applicant himself/herself.
